ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the experiment (e.g., initial training, fine-tuning) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "maxKL" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the iteration */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss value before training */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of return */,
  "meanKL" REAL /* Mean KL divergence */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity */,
  "num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss value after training */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the project (e.g., model development, hyperparameter tuning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., images, text) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the model in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_framework" TEXT /* Framework used to develop the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_datasets" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in the experiment (e.g., training, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "model_role" TEXT /* Role of the model in the experiment (e.g., main, auxiliary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data engineer, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to (e.g., university, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
